parameters.content:
CONTENT REPURPOSING PIPELINE — V0.1
Monitors an RSS feed every 15 minutes. For each new article, generates multi-channel 
content drafts (Twitter, LinkedIn, newsletter, titles, hashtags) via OpenAI, then 
routes to a human approval gate before publishing. Built with idempotency, schema 
validation, retry logic, and full state tracking.

RSS INGESTION
Fetches the TechCrunch RSS feed and parses XML to JSON. Extracts the 5 most recent articles.
 Computes a source_hash (normalized URL + publish date) used as the idempotency key throughout the pipeline.

DEDUPLICATION GATE
Reads all existing rows from the sheet before processing. Cross-references each 
incoming source_hash against known items entirely in memory. Only articles with no 
existing record proceed — all others are silently skipped. Prevents reprocessing 
on every 15-minute trigger cycle.

LLM GENERATION + VALIDATION
Builds a deterministic content block from article metadata  and full article body, sending it to gpt-4o-mini with a strict JSON schema prompt. The response is parsed and validated 
against required fields and types. Failed items increment a retry counter — items 
exceeding 2 retries are quarantined. Valid items advance to GENERATED state.

HUMAN APPROVAL GATE
Sets state to PENDING_APPROVAL and sends a structured email notification containing 
all generated content for review. No content proceeds to publishing without explicit 
human approval. State is persisted to the sheet after notification is sent.

APPROVAL + PUBLISH WORKFLOW
Runs every 15 minutes independently of the main workflow. Scans all sheet rows for 
items in APPROVED state with no published_at timestamp. For each approved item, 
generates a structured Google Doc draft and records the destination URL. Guarded 
against double-publishing.

PUBLISH GUARD
Two-condition check: state must equal APPROVED and published_at must be empty. 
Both conditions must be true for an item to proceed. Ensures that approved items 
are never published twice even if the workflow runs multiple times.

DRAFT CREATION + STATE CLOSE
Builds a formatted Google Doc containing all five content outputs. Creates the 
document in the designated Drive folder, writes content in a second pass (Google 
Docs API constraint), then updates the sheet row with state PUBLISHED, the 
document URL, and a published_at timestamp to close the state machine.

ARTICLE BODY FETCH (V0.2)
Fetches full article HTML from source_url and strips tags to extract clean body text. Adds article_body and article_fetch_status fields. On fetch failure, pipeline degrades gracefully to title-only generation. Pipeline fields are explicitly re-anchored after each HTTP node to prevent n8n response overwrite behavior.
